title: SACRAMENTO—Assemblymember James C. Ramos (D-San Bernardino) today announced his 2025 legislative package.
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 31 authorizes the state Department of Justice to grant tribal police from three California tribes state peace officer status if they meet the same California requirements and standards as other police officers in the state.",
    "The enactment of AB 31 would assist all law enforcement by clarifying jurisdiction and permitting tribal police to assist communities close to reservations.",
    "AB 221 would streamline the existing Tribal Nation Grant Fund process to provide annual equal distribution grants to all federally recognized tribes that either have no gaming or operate less than 350 Class III gaming devices.",
    "Federally recognized Indian tribes pay for the grant funds that exclusively benefit eligible federally recognized nongaming and limited gaming tribes.",
    "AB 249 would require state specified housing and homelessness programs to use a youth-specific coordinated entry system to assist homeless youth receive housing related services.",
    "AB 285 would require that a 180-day criminal protective order be issued when a defendant convicted of domestic violence or sex offenses is released from state prison to protect the victim(s) they were convicted of harming.",
    "AB 308 would encourage county behavioral health directors to develop training in conjunction with law enforcement for mobile crisis response teams.",
    "AB 308 would also encourage a county behavioral health director to develop procedures that would educate teams on proper use of force, de-escalation and stabilization techniques.",
    "AB 362 would add tribal water uses as a beneficial use of water in the state.",
    "AB 440 would mandate the California Department of Transportation to create policies to evaluate, report and develop suicide preventative measures for bridges in the state highway system."
  ]
}
```
